scripts.check:all:
cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && npm test && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run frontend:build && cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --locked && cargo clippy --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && cargo fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --check && npm audit && node -e "console.log('Tests ran:
- cargo test
- npm test
- eslint
- prettier
- frontend:build
- cargo check
- clippy
- fmt
- npm audit
All passed!')"
scripts.fix:all:
cargo fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && npm run format:write && eslint --fix . && npm audit fix && node -e "console.log('Fixed:
- cargo fmt
- prettier
- eslint
- npm audit fix
All fixes applied!')"
